picks.rationale: Google owns the full AI stack (Gemini, TPUs, Cloud) with Q1 revenue up 21.8% YoY to $109.90B and Cloud growing 63%, trades at a reasonable 27x trailing P/E with strong analyst consensus (58 buy ratings, zero sells).
GEV surged +16.09% in the past month and is up +64.10% YTD, benefiting from a bullish Bernstein initiation with a $1,206 target and strong nuclear/AI energy demand catalyst.
Amazon trades at 31.64x P/E with a stellar news sentiment of 0.506, strong analyst consensus (strong_buy, an_score 1.34), and +6.90% weekly momentum as hyperscaler AI demand accelerates.
Rolls-Royce has positive 1-month momentum (+15.20%), a reasonable P/E of 21.07, and news sentiment of 0.136, catalyzed by UK defense spending and nuclear submarine/SMR opportunities.

Astera Labs maintains strong analyst consensus (strong_buy, an_score 1.32) with +12.73% 1-month momentum and news sentiment of 0.382, riding AI data center interconnect demand despite weekly pullback.
Despite recent weekly weakness, 285A has +636.21% YTD and +7.02% 1-month momentum, with a 1-day bounce of +10.16% showing resilient demand for advanced memory in AI infrastructure.
BWXT has positive news sentiment of 0.394, +3.43% 1-month momentum, and a low beta of 0.734, positioned as a stable nuclear play for AI-driven energy demand.
MaxLinear has spectacular +403.08% YTD and +1.89% 1-month momentum despite a steep 1-day drop, reflecting extreme volatility but strong long-term AI connectivity demand.
Vistra has strong analyst consensus (strong_buy, an_score 1.40) and a 0.61% dividend yield, with nuclear/energy assets essential for AI data center power, despite recent 1-week pullback.
Talen Energy has a news sentiment of 0.288 and is highlighted as 'Stock Of The Day' by Investor's Business Daily, delivering for Amazon AI data centers with nuclear-powered infrastructure.

MU has strong_buy consensus, P/E 26.1, +266% YTD, and recent earnings beat with 345% revenue growth; memory supercycle confirmed by analysts.
MRVL shows strong_buy consensus, +35.8% 1M momentum, and highest news sentiment at 0.442; P/E 102 reflects AI networking demand.
CRDO has strong_buy consensus, +20.3% 1M, +11% 1D, and news sentiment 0.294; P/E 108.8 but strong AI data-center connectivity demand.
GEV gained 73% YTD, +23.7% 1M, with a reasonable P/E of 34.4 and buy consensus; SMR exposure and AI data-center power demand support.
